repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current operator ca6k_01864 belongs to the torch#1 category, which shares code generation and build patterns with the selected memories. 193e1ac4 covers redefinition errors from manual OP_ADD conflicting with autogen REG_OP, a common pitfall. 84bb2c98 addresses TilingFunc setter method errors (no member named set_*), frequent in torch#1 ops. a6bc156b handles redefinition from duplicate REG_OP. 97942dc1 deals with missing tiling header files, which can cause build failures in kernel compilation. 3fea4f99 also covers redefinition from duplicate REG_OP, providing an alternative pattern. Together, these memories offer diverse remedies for likely issues in this operator family.
